title: gitmap latest-branch --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap latest-branch --format=json`. Top-level is a single object describing the most recently updated branch and optionally a top-N list of other branches.

branch.description: Human-readable branch name(s) that point at the latest commit.

sha.description: Shortened SHA of the latest commit (7 characters).

commitDate.description: Formatted commit date in display layout (e.g. '01-Jan-2025 12:00 PM (UTC)').

subject.description: Commit subject line of the latest commit.

top.description: Top-N most recently updated branches (present only when --top=N > 0).

branch.description: Branch name with remote prefix stripped (e.g. 'main').

sha.description: Shortened SHA of the commit (7 characters).

commitDate.description: Formatted commit date in display layout.
